subComponents.name: DayItemSimpleCalendar
subComponents.description: Individual day cell. 40×40px. Shared with Calendar Simple. Appearance determined by state + type + today combination.

anatomy.description: Outer panel surface. 390px wide. Bottom corners rounded (--rounded-16, 16px). Top corners flat. Background: --surface/neutral/default (#f1f2f4). Padding H: --spacing-16 (16px). Padding bottom: --spacing-4 (4px). Padding top: --spacing-0 (0px).

Row of 7 abbreviated day labels: SUN, MON, TUE, WED, THU, FRI, SAT. 40px height (full states), 36px height (small state). Equally distributed. Manrope Regular 11px. Color: --text/placeholder (#636377).
5 rows of 7 DayItemSimpleCalendar cells. In full states, all rows are visible. In small state, only the current week row is visible (overflow clipped).
Individual 40×40px day cell. Props: date (string), state (Available|Disable|Selected), type (No-plan|Planned), today (boolean).
32×4px rounded bar at the bottom of the container. Indicates bottom-sheet drag affordance. Background: --button/secondary/bg-default (rgba(29,29,35,0.05)).

states.name: Default
states.description: Full month view. No date selected. No today highlight. No planned indicators (except example days 3, 7, 10, 21, 22, 23, 30 shown as Planned in Figma).

states.name: Today
states.description: Full month view. Today's date (day 9) is shown as Selected (dark circle). Planned indicators visible.

states.name: Active
states.description: Full month view. A non-today date (day 6) is selected. Today (day 9) shows a lighter circle highlight (today=true, state=Available).

states.name: small
states.description: Collapsed view. Only the current week row (days 5–11) is visible. Overflow clipped. Day 6 is Selected, day 9 has today=true. Total height: 96px.

dayItemCombinations.description: Standard selectable day. Plain date number.
Today's date, not yet selected. Lighter filled circle background. Plain date number.
Out-of-month overflow day. Greyed date number. Not selectable.
Day with a scheduled activity. Date number + 6×6px orange dot indicator below.
Currently selected day. Dark filled circle background. Inverted date text.

variantNote: No structural variants. Single visual style.

sizes.name: small
sizes.note: Overflow clipped. Only current week row visible.

weekdayOrderNote: Confirmed from Figma. Week starts on Sunday.
usageContext: Embedded in the Plan page of Dojo apps (Customer and Driver).
Displayed as a bottom-sheet or drawer panel.
Used to communicate scheduled jobs or deliveries per day.
Collapses to the small state to show only the current week when space is limited.
notes: This component does not include a month navigation header (no CalendarTitle sub-component).
The handle at the bottom indicates bottom-sheet draggability — it is not interactive in the current Figma design.
DayItemSimpleCalendar is shared with the Calendar Simple component.
The today highlight (lighter circle) and planned indicator dot are image assets in Figma.
